channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UN Warns Kenya and World on Slow Progress in Making Buildings Climate-Friendly

item.title: Collection of Political Cartoons Published on 20 May 2026
item.description: The Age has compiled a selection of political cartoons for 20 May 2026, showcasing a range of satirical illustrations reflecting the current political climate in Australia. The gallery includes 13 ima...

item.title: Backyard Bare Knuckle Boxing in Australia: Risks, Culture and Controversy
item.description: In Sydney, a backyard on Australia Day transforms into an unofficial bare knuckle boxing venue, complete with rubber mats, a barbecue, and a crowd eager to watch men fight without gloves. These events...

item.title: Defence Minister Tours Snowbirds Base as Discussions Continue on Team's Future
item.description: Canada’s Defence Minister is visiting the Snowbirds air demonstration squadron’s base in Moose Jaw, Saskatchewan, amid ongoing uncertainty about the team’s future. The Snowbirds, known formally as 431...

item.title: NBC Dodoma Marathon 2026 Aims to Raise Funds for Health and Community Support
item.description: The seventh NBC Dodoma Marathon is set for July 26, 2026, in Dodoma City, with organisers hoping to attract more than 15,000 runners from across Tanzania and abroad. The marathon, now a major event in...

item.title: Canada Faces Challenges in Preserving CUSMA Ahead of U.S. Review
item.description: According to Washington correspondent Tracy Moran, there is growing concern that Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney may not be fully committed to securing trade stability with the United States. The ...

item.title: Three people killed in San Diego mosque shooting; attackers found dead
item.description: A tragic shooting occurred at the Islamic Center of San Diego on Monday, resulting in the deaths of three individuals. Authorities report that two teenage gunmen, aged 19 and 17, were later found dead...

item.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu: An action-packed adventure with heart and charm
item.description: The Mandalorian and Grogu marks the first cinematic release in the Star Wars universe since the pandemic, carrying significant expectations after a seven-year gap. Rather than serving as a statement o...

item.title: Sarah Rector: Childhood Millionaire and Trailblazer in Early 20th Century America
item.description: Sarah Rector (1902–1967) was an African American girl who became one of the youngest Black millionaires in the United States at age 11, when oil was discovered on land she inherited in Oklahoma. Born ...

item.title: FIA takes action against officers and individual after Sarafa Bazaar raid in Karachi
item.description: Islamabad: The Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) Karachi Zone has taken strict action following a controversial raid at a jewellery shop in Karachi's Sarafa Bazaar. Two FIA officers were suspended an...

item.title: SpaceX prepares Starship V3 for first test flight ahead of IPO
item.description: SpaceX is set to conduct the 12th uncrewed test flight of its next-generation Starship rocket this week, marking the first launch of the upgraded Starship V3. This new version of the fully reusable ro...

item.title: Shakira Cleared of 2011 Spanish Tax Fraud; Government to Refund 60 Million Euros
item.description: Spanish courts have officially acquitted Colombian singer Shakira in a tax fraud case related to the 2011 tax year. The Madrid-based court ruled that Spanish authorities failed to demonstrate that Sha...

item.title: Exploring Australia’s Potential for Next-Generation Geothermal Energy
item.description: Australia has vast potential to tap into next-generation geothermal energy by accessing superhot rocks deep underground. Unlike traditional geothermal systems limited to volcanic areas, new drilling t...

item.title: Top 8 Smart Home Devices to Enhance Your Daily Life
item.description: Smart homes are increasingly becoming a practical choice for Canadians looking to simplify daily routines and save time. This article highlights eight smart devices across various aspects of home life...

item.title: KP CM Afridi and Family Denied Meeting with Imprisoned Imran Khan at Adiala Jail
item.description: On Tuesday, the Capital Police prevented Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi from visiting Adiala Jail in Rawalpindi to meet PTI founder Imran Khan, who has been serving a 14-year sentence...

item.title: Oparaodu Charges Rivers United Players Ahead of Final NPFL Match

item.title: Koeman confident Netherlands squad can challenge anyone at World Cup
item.description: Netherlands manager Ronald Koeman has expressed strong confidence in his squad ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, asserting that his team has the talent to challenge any opponent. Despite not being wid...

item.title: PM Modi in Norway: Journalist's Questions, MEA Response, and Press Freedom Discussion
item.description: During Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to Norway as part of his five-nation tour, a brief but notable incident involving a Norwegian journalist escalated into a wider debate on press freedom. At ...
